properties.entry: By linking the Attendance records of the U+ Works and the best security company "S1" system. Fast and accurate management is possible. It is provided for free during the beta service period
"It is possible to conveniently manage the clock in/out information by automatically transmitting the clock in/out information of employees registered in S1 SECOM to the U+ Works Attendance."
Provides automatic linkage of clock in/out information
- If you set the transmission time, clock in/out information at that time is automatically transmitted to U+ Works Attendance.
- You can conveniently transmit the clock in/out records for the selected period through the previous day's information transmission and past history transmission functions.
How to use Attendance linkage service
- After requesting the service in the customer center, the "SECOM Information Management" tab is created in Admin Setting> Attendance.
- Download the linkage program from the SECOM information management tab and install it on the SECOM server for use.
By linking the Attendance records of the U+ Works and the CAPS. Fast and accurate clock in/out information management is possible.
"It is possible to conveniently manage the clock in/out information by automatically transmitting the clock in/out information of employees registered in ADT CAPS to the U+ Works Attendance."
Provides automatic linkage of ADT CAPS's clock in/out information
- If you set the transmission time, clock in/out information at that time is automatically transmitted to U+ Works Attendance.
- You can conveniently transmit the clock in/out records for the selected period through the previous day's information transmission and past history transmission functions.
How to use Attendance linkage service
- After requesting the service in the customer center, the "ADT CAPS Information Management" tab is created in Admin Setting> Attendance.
- Download the linkage program from the ADT CAPS information management tab and install it on the SECOM server for use.
It is a service that allows you to systematically manage sales activities such as sales opportunities, proposals, contracts, and orders, and check the status of sales simply.
“We provide a solution that can increase sales success by managing customer information efficiently.”
You can check all activities related to a specific customer (client company)
- You can check sales opportunities, customers, sales activities, mail details, items, quotations, contracts, etc. related to a specific customer (client company) on one screen.
- In addition to simply checking the contents, you can register and manage necessary activities simply.
- The contents of the quotation are linked to the contract, and the contents of the quotation can be converted into contract information and automatically registered.
- It is possible to quickly respond to customer's (client company) requests, and the existing quotation is maintained, enabling continuous customer (customer) management.
Establish a sales strategy that fits the sales goal of the sales department
- You can systematically establish sales goal for each store (department) and person in charge by setting the period for monthly, quarterly, or annually.
- By comparing the previously registered sales goal and performance data, it is provided in the form of a dashboard where you can check simply whether the goal has been achieved.
You can efficiently manage personnel information, salaries, bonuses, and attendance of employees of the company.
"Systematic personnel management such as basic personnel information, salary, bonus, application for congratulation and condolence expenses, and issuance of certificates is possible."
Provides functions and settings optimized for companies.
- It is designed to satisfy various company conditions and systematically manages personal information for each employee.
- By connecting the company organization chart, individual and common tasks between employees can be carried out at once.
Automatic calculation of salary payments and standards
- Automatically calculates benefits for holiday and overtime working through attendance and time settings.
- Provides a function to manage payment standards and payment dates.
- Supports real-time communication with employees by providing a business messenger based on an organization chart.
It provides systematic inventory management functions such as incoming/release management of items, sales purchase tax invoice, and transaction details required for busiess.
“Efficient work is possible by managing incoming/release of items necessary for business and accurate inventory management.
- Provides a graph screen that allows you to check the incoming/release status simply.
- Provides a report that allows you to check the incoming, release, and inventory status.
Item information management suitable for the company
- You can search and manage the same item group By categorizing items.
- You can comprehensively manage incoming, release and inventory status through various item categories.
Share real-time progress by reflecting the work process structure
- From order (obtain) to shipment, it can be set and applied sequentially according to the business processing structure of the company.
- As each department can share the work progress, it is possible to allocate employee and task to the right place, and improve the overall work efficiency of the company.
and reward you with better service.
X-X out of the total X
X-X out of the total X
X-X out of the total X
X-X out of the total X
Inquiries received through online inquiry will be answered after checking in the customer center and can be checked on the online customer center screen.
When the answer is available, a text message will be sent to the mobile phone number registered below.
When submitting an error, please enter the user's ID Information and the specific error details.
Please enter your ID for error inquiries and your full name for general inquiries. ID is used when checking the error log.
# Example of writing when registering errors
Please enter the ID or Name.
Mail sent successfully. the agent is processing.
